subcodes.first_line: In all the Tablets have We counselled the servants of God concerning virtuous character and praiseworthy deeds, and the Pen [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: در جمیع الواح عباد الله را باخلاق مرضیه و اعمال پسندیده وصیت نمودیم و قلم
subcodes.subjects: @exhortations and counsels, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @unity; oneness of humanity, @serving humanity; working for progress, betterment of the world
